title: Sendoso Send Structure
description: Field-by-field structural documentation for the Sendoso Send resource

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status. pending → processing → shipped → delivered. Cancellation only possible in pending state.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Personalized gift message included with the send

fields.name: tracking_number
fields.description: Carrier tracking number. Null until item ships.

fields.name: tracking_url
fields.description: Direct link to carrier tracking page

fields.name: estimated_delivery
fields.description: Estimated delivery date in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Total cost in USD including item price and shipping

fields.name: crm_id
fields.description: External CRM object ID for attribution (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

fields.name: crm_type
fields.description: CRM object type for the associated crm_id

fields.name: team_id
fields.description: The Sendoso team that owns and is billed for this send

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the send was initiated

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status change
